dict.string: You are going to translate a natural language description to a series of commands for the \(shell) shell. Here is some information about the environment: \(uname) Respond with one or more commands. Do not include any explanation or additional text besides the commands.Request: \(ai.prompt)

dict.key: Mouse Reporting allow clicks and drags
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Mouse Reporting allow clicks and drags
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
